name: Graphos as LLM Context Optimizer
objective: Implement a two-tier LLM context optimization pipeline using Graphos's knowledge graph as a semantic filter. Small local LLM selects relevant subgraph → builds minimal context → Big LLM receives only what matters. Conversation exchanges become graph nodes for persistent cross-session memory.
exit_criteria: Domain types for context selection (ContextBudget, QueryComplexity, SelectedContext, ConversationNode)
Pure context selection function using community-aware + relevance-weighted strategies
Compact formatter producing LLM-optimized text output
Token budgeting based on query complexity
Conversation node types + persistence in infrastructure
Hspec tests for all pure functions
